content.speakerText: Tell me about a time when your strength made a real difference in a project.
content.speakerTextCn: 说说你的一项优势是如何在某个项目中产生实际影响的。
expectedAnswers: My attention to detail caught a critical bug in the client’s data model before launch, saving us two weeks of rework and maintaining their trust.
I used my communication skills to mediate a conflict between design and engineering teams, which accelerated our sprint timeline by 40%.
I took the initiative to create a shared knowledge base after noticing team members were repeating the same mistakes—this reduced onboarding time by half.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确回应了问题，聚焦于‘优势’和‘影响’
是否使用了具体情境（Situation）、行动（Action）和结果（Result）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'initiative', 'communication', 'efficiency', 'accuracy' 等

content.speakerText: How do you ensure you stay ahead in your field?
content.speakerTextCn: 你如何确保自己在领域中保持领先？
expectedAnswers: I dedicate at least 5 hours a week to learning new tools—I recently completed a certification in data visualization that improved my reporting efficiency by 30%.
I actively seek feedback and apply it quickly—I’ve improved my presentation skills by practicing with peers and iterating after every talk.
I follow industry leaders and test new methodologies in small projects first—I’ve implemented agile practices in two teams already.
evaluationCriteria: 是否体现持续学习或自我提升的主动态度
是否包含具体行动和可衡量的结果
是否使用了如 'certification', 'feedback', 'methodologies', 'implement' 等职场高频表达

content.scenarioHint: 在面试中，面试官希望你主动展示自己的核心优势，你需要用具体事例说明你与众不同的能力。
content.speakerText: What do you think makes you the best fit for this role?
content.speakerTextCn: 你认为什么让你最适合这个职位？
expectedAnswers: I have a proven track record of improving team efficiency—I reduced report processing time by 40% in my last job.
I’m highly adaptable and thrive in fast-changing environments—I led three major project pivots successfully last year.
I combine technical expertise with strong communication—I translate complex data into clear insights for non-technical stakeholders.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了个人核心优势并关联职位需求
语言准确性：语法、时态和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者面试中的自然表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'track record', 'adaptability', 'technical expertise', 'communication' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 面试官让你阐述自己区别于其他候选人的独特价值，你需要用具体经历支撑你的回答。
content.speakerText: How would you describe your biggest strength in this field?
content.speakerTextCn: 你如何描述你在这一领域最大的优势？
expectedAnswers: My biggest strength is problem-solving under constraints—I delivered a critical project two weeks ahead of schedule with half the budget.
I’m naturally curious and self-driven—I taught myself SQL through online courses and now use it daily to optimize workflows.
I build trust quickly—I’ve been told by managers that I’m the person teams turn to when things get messy.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确点出一项核心优势并用实例证明
语言准确性：是否正确使用了过去时、比较结构和专业词汇
表达自然度：是否避免了空泛词汇如 'hard worker'，而使用具体、生动的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'problem-solving', 'self-driven', 'trust', 'optimize', 'constraints' 等场景关键词
